items.title: Cape Verde do it again and Lamine Yamal spurs on Spain | World Cup Daily
items.summary: Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning , Jeff Rueter and Mark Langdon as Cape Verde claim yet another historic point and Spain finally look like a team worthy of the favourites tag. Continue reading...

items.title: Cesc Fabregas’ Como plotting raid on former club Chelsea to sign England star after securing Champions League spot
items.summary: CESC FABREGAS is reportedly plotting to raid former club Chelsea for the services of Trevoh Chalobah. items.title: Major broadcasting change proposed after fury at Champions League final not being shown on free-to-air TV
items.summary: A MAJOR change to broadcasting is on the table after fan fury at the coverage of the Champions League final. items.title: Cape Verde are the story of this World Cup - they are everyone's second team
items.summary: Those waking up on Monday morning in the UK will look at one particular result and be stunned. "Cape Verde did it again?!" was probably your reaction.
